snippets.title: Three ways to define a function
snippets.explanation: Declarations are available before their line due to hoisting.

snippets.title: Higher-order functions
snippets.code:
const nums = [1, 2, 3, 4];
const doubled = nums.map((n) => n * 2);   // [2, 4, 6, 8]
const evens = nums.filter((n) => n % 2 === 0); // [2, 4]
const sum = nums.reduce((acc, n) => acc + n, 0); // 10
snippets.explanation: Functions that take or return functions enable declarative data processing.
